name: You Versus A Max Leveled Necromancer
description:
Your party was just heading back to the village when suddenly, Araya, A max leveled Necromancer blocked your path! You were the only member in your party in good condition to fight! Would you lose?

Rizz her up, Fight her, Play cards with her, waste her time, do whatever my man.

Requested this art from Yare! Let him kill me 20 times in Jujutsu shenanigans for this!!!

(yarearedaze on discord)

And.... yes, her last name is a JoJo reference. Also um... her line at the end of the first message kinda sucks please ignore that.
creator: WixxpWasUsed
